query:
-- Find Zara in savedCharacters
SELECT id, name, description, photoUrl, previewUrl, gender, animStyle, userId, createdAt 
FROM savedCharacters 
WHERE LOWER(name) LIKE '%zara%' 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 5;
